{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025101B9FE19B81ED62F141639"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263830078021255977","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我回忆起了自己的高中时光，
我在衡水那边读高中，本身生活是非常枯燥和紧张的。我见过那种上课睡觉，下课谈对象，但是分数却总是高高在上的天才。当时的我尽管十分努力，却总是超不过他们，我觉得觉得很痛苦，却又无可奈何。
我希望在这本书里，借助主角苏曹的视角，我可以打败那些并不努力的天才。因为天分，只能代表你能走多高，但是努力可以决定你又能走多远。
小小感悟，与君共勉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691242294,"group_id":"7258982121354562596","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4t2Pb26rqMFu052V5BufdE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-passport.byteacctimg.com/img/user-avatar/636d9098a7c40b65c6c888b48a6b9439~300x300.image","user_id":"356696701556935","user_name":"马路卡黑鸭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"356696701556935","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258982121354562596","book_info":{"abstract":"【学霸】+【系统】+【都市】+【爽文】=？
苏曹来到高中，开局觉醒了学霸系统。
本以为这是开挂的人生，谁知这系统竟然让苏曹各种摆烂、玩耍，就是不学习。
高三以后，一次系统的提醒，主角彻底断开了与摆烂的联系，开始奋进，努力。
“爱心小糖豆，大幅度提高智力值10分钟；”
“嫩滑滑香皂，永久提高智力值和记忆力；”
“清爽创可贴，20分钟以内免疫负面效果；”
……
我是苏曹，现在，我不止要我自己考上清北，我也要我全班的同学一起，考上清北！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o65c8a2044d99f00e2c7ede5a756d6c13~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大笔杆子","author_id":"","book_id":"7258982121354562596","book_name":"纯摆烂？我带全班上清北！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8d8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7258982190573158952","read_count":"17","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"190073"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"91","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o65c8a2044d99f00e2c7ede5a756d6c13~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389461&x-signature=MaRfJC8AaMcHDUH6bM0NdCONZug%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1890757075544680","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.7403937e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025101B9FE19B81ED62F141639"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":51663,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":69066,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":179},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"c
